_meta.scrapedBy: Claude Code (Claude-in-Chrome) from the authenticated Signzy API portal 'My APIs' docs pages

auth.scheme: opaque bearer-style token in the Authorization header (NOT 'Bearer <t>' — the raw token value)
auth.note: Test Mode toggle in the portal switches the account between test and live credentials. Signzy also refer to the gateway as 'kong' in some docs.

rules: Every response is wrapped: bureau APIs use {statusCode,message,data:{...}}; most verification APIs use {result:{...}}.
Two of the twelve APIs (aadhaar-to-uan, esign-using-doc-signer) show a 'REQUEST API' button — NOT yet enabled on this account (needs access request). The other ten show 'Try out this API' (enabled).
The portal 'Studio APIs' tab is empty (No APIs Found) — these 12 are the full catalog on this account.
JSON here wins if it disagrees with the prose in SignzyGuide.md.

apis.name: Hybrid Bank Account Verification
apis.summary: Penny-less bank account verification across 80+ banks with automatic penny-drop fallback; returns account active status, name-match and account holder name.

requestFields.name: beneficiaryIFSC
requestFields.desc: IFSC code of the beneficiary bank

requestFields.name: nameMatchScore
requestFields.desc: threshold; if API's computed name-match score exceeds it, nameMatch returns 'yes' else 'no'

requestFields.name: nameFuzzy
requestFields.desc: enable fuzzy name match; fuzzy threshold is 0.7

requestFields.name: fetchAccountNumber
requestFields.desc: true to echo the account number in the output

apis.responseFields: result.{active(yes|no), reason(success|'Either ifsc or bank account is invalid'|'Invalid account number or IFSC provided'), nameMatch(yes|no|'not available'), mobileMatch, signzyReferenceId, nameMatchScore(0..1 or 'not available'), auditTrail{nature='BANK RRN',value=<RRN>,timestamp}, bankTransfer{response,bankRRN,beneName,beneMMID,beneMobile,beneIFSC}}

result.reason: Either ifsc or bank account is invalid

apis.name: PAN 206AB Compliance (Individual Search)
apis.summary: Checks a PAN for Section 206AB compliance; returns masked name, PAN-Aadhaar link status, operative/inoperative status and specified-person flag.
apis.responseFields: number, entityName(masked), panAllotmentDate(DD-MM-YYYY), panAadhaarLinkStatus, compliant('true' if isSpecified=='No'), isSpecified(Yes|No — Yes = non-filer with TDS/TCS >= 50k), currentFY, panStatus(operative|inoperative)

apis.name: DigiLocker — Create URL
apis.summary: Generates a DigiLocker consent iframe URL + a requestId. The requestId is later used by Get e-Aadhaar. On consent completion Signzy POSTs the full Aadhaar detail to callbackUrl.

requestFields.name: signup
requestFields.desc: true enables signup flow (new DigiLocker account); such users must separately link Aadhaar via DigiLocker+OTP before IDs can be fetched

requestFields.name: callbackUrl
requestFields.desc: URL to which the Aadhaar detail / consent result is POSTed

requestFields.name: logoVisible
requestFields.desc: 'true' to show a logo on the consent page

requestFields.name: docType
requestFields.desc: doc types to request consent for; default ['PANCR','ADHAR','DRVLC']; only listed types show on the consent page

requestFields.name: getScope
requestFields.desc: true pushes granted-scope info on the callback

requestFields.name: internalId
requestFields.desc: your tracking id echoed back in the callback

requestFields.name: pinlessAuthentication
requestFields.desc: PIN-free DigiLocker mobile login (Wayne domain only)

requestFields.name: getBase64Files
requestFields.desc: return base64 instead of persist URLs

callback_on_consentComplete.aadharDetail: { name, uid(masked), dob, gender, x509Data{...}, address, photo(url), splitAddress{district[],state[[name,code]],city[],pincode,country[],addressLine,landMark}, signatureData{...}, xmlFileLink, aadhaarJpeg, aadhaarPdf }

apis.name: DigiLocker — Get e-Aadhaar
apis.summary: Fetches the e-Aadhaar identity (name, masked UID, DOB, gender, address, split address, photo) plus X.509 signature validity, using the requestId from Create URL.

requestFields.name: requestId
requestFields.desc: requestId returned by Create URL after consent

requestFields.name: extraDigitalCertificateParams
requestFields.desc: true also returns signatureData (XML digital-signature block)

requestFields.name: getBase64Files
requestFields.desc: return base64 instead of persist URLs

apis.responseFields: result.{name, uid(first 8 masked), dob(DD/MM/YYYY), gender, x509Data{subjectName,certificate,details{...},validAadhaarDSC(yes|no)}, address, photo(url), splitAddress{district[],state,city[],pincode,country[],addressLine,landMark}, signatureData(only if extraDigitalCertificateParams=true)}, aadhaarJpeg(url), aadhaarPdf(url)

apis.name: DigiLocker — Get e-Aadhaar with XML
apis.navixStep: DigiLocker KYC (step 2 variant — Aadhaar + signed XML)
apis.summary: Identical to Get e-Aadhaar but additionally returns result.xmlFileLink — a downloadable link to the signed Aadhaar XML.
apis.responseFields: Same as Get e-Aadhaar PLUS result.xmlFileLink (URL of the signed Aadhaar XML file).

apis.name: Liveness Secure (createUrl + getData)
apis.summary: AI passive-liveness in an iframe (no manual selfie). createUrl returns a token + videoUrl to load in an iframe (allow='camera'); results arrive via callbackUrl (async) or are polled with getData using the token. Supports optional face-match against a provided matchImage.

requestFields.name: matchImage
requestFields.desc: public URLs of ID/face image to face-match against the live video (.png/.jpg/.tiff)

requestFields.name: callbackUrl
requestFields.desc: webhook that receives the result JSON

requestFields.name: accentColor
requestFields.desc: hex color for the journey UI

requestFields.name: backgroundColor
requestFields.desc: hex color or 'transparent' for the UI background

requestFields.name: additionalChecks
requestFields.desc: 'true' flags mask/hat/glasses/sunglasses; 3 attempts then journey completes

requestFields.name: reviewImage
requestFields.desc: 'true' lets the user review the captured image

requestFields.name: allowCameraSwitch
requestFields.desc: 'true' shows the flip-camera icon on mobile

requestFields.name: piiDeletionTTL
requestFields.desc: TTL for the captured-image persist URL (e.g. '2 mins','24 hrs','6 months','1 year'); default 6 months

integrationNotes: Parent window listens for postMessage event data === 'Verification Done'.
result.status is the overall pass/fail computed from liveness score + face-match score.
isUsed=1 means the journey finished for that token.

apis.name: Aadhaar to UAN
apis.enabledNote: Shows 'REQUEST API' — not enabled on this account yet.
apis.navixStep: Employment / salary verification (find UAN from Aadhaar)
apis.summary: Given Aadhaar + name + DOB, returns the individual's UAN (EPFO Universal Account Number) and linked details.

statusCodes.500: Upstream is down / Server Side Error

apis.name: UAN Passbook without OTP
apis.navixStep: Salary / income verification (EPFO passbook — infer salary from EPF contributions)
apis.summary: Retrieves the full EPF passbook for a UAN without OTP: employer history + per-month contribution entries (employee/employer/pension share). Basic salary is typically 40-50% of total, so EPF deductions help estimate salary.

requestFields.name: callBackUrl
requestFields.desc: webhook for the async passbook response

requestFields.name: ttl
requestFields.desc: cache duration (days, 0-30) to serve previously fetched data

apis.name: eSign Using Doc Signer
apis.enabledNote: Shows 'REQUEST API' — not enabled on this account yet.
apis.navixStep: Loan AGREEMENT / sanction-letter e-signing (+ optional eStamp/eChallan)
apis.summary: Applies a Document Signer Certificate (Class 2 or Class 3) digital signature to a PDF at configurable positions; optional eStamp / eChallan. Returns the signed PDF (URL if input was URL/base64).

requestFields.name: pdf
requestFields.desc: PDF to sign — URL or base64

requestFields.name: certificateId
requestFields.desc: certificate id for the chosen class (from UploadDocSignConfig API)

requestFields.name: signatures
requestFields.desc: signature placements: {pageNo[](numbers or 'ALL'/'LAST'), signaturePosition[](TOPLEFT..BOTTOMRIGHT|CUSTOMIZE), xCoordinate[], yCoordinate[], height(min 70), width(min 130)}

requestFields.name: fileTtl
requestFields.desc: TTL of the signed PDF, e.g. '2 days'

requestFields.name: estamp
requestFields.desc: eStamp/eChallan block: type(eStamp|eChallan), stampDetails[]{stateCode,articleCode,stampDutyValue,purposeOfStampDuty,count}, firstPartyName, secondPartyName, stampDutyPaidBy, considerationPrice

apis.name: Experian Lite Bureau Report
apis.navixStep: Credit bureau pull (Experian) — maps to NAVIX ExperianClient 'individual_experian'
apis.summary: Full Experian credit report keyed on phone+name (+PAN, optional DOB/pincode). Returns the same jsonExperianReport structure NAVIX already parses (Current_Application, CAIS_Account/Summary, TotalCAPS_Summary, SCORE.FCIREXScore).

requestFields.name: pan
requestFields.desc: PAN (optional in Method 1, part of Method 2)

requestFields.name: alternateFlow
requestFields.desc: 'masked-Mobile-Flow' (then use consentMessageId CM_2; masks Mobile_Telephone_Number to last 5, Telephone_Number to last 4, and returns no excel report)

requestFields.name: consent
requestFields.desc: {consentFlag(bool), consentTimestamp(sec/ms), consentIpAddress, consentMessageId(CM_1 default, CM_2 for masked-Mobile-Flow)}

methods: Method 2: phone + firstName + lastName + PAN + DOB + pincode
apis.responseFields: {statusCode, message, data:{jsonExperianReport:{Header, UserMessage, CreditProfileHeader{Version,ReportNumber}, Current_Application{Current_Application_Details}, CAIS_Account, CAIS_Summary, Match_result, TotalCAPS_Summary, CAPS, Credit_Account, Total_Outstanding_Balance, SCORE{FCIREXScore,FCIREXScoreConfidLevel}}, excelExperianReport(url — absent in masked-Mobile-Flow)}}

apis.name: CRIF Bureau Report
apis.navixStep: Credit bureau fallback (CRIF) — maps to NAVIX CrifClient
apis.summary: Full CRIF High Mark credit report keyed on phone+PAN+name+DOB+gender+address+pincode (all mandatory). Returns crifReport.INDV-REPORT-FILE structure with SCORES[].SCORE-VALUE.
apis.responseFields: {statusCode, message, data:{crifReport:{INDV-REPORT-FILE:{INDV-REPORTS:[{INDV-REPORT:{PERSONAL-INFO-VARIATION{NAME-VARIATIONS[],ADDRESS-VARIATIONS[]}, SCORES[{SCORE-VALUE,SCORE-FACTORS}], ACCOUNTS-SUMMARY, RESPONSES, ADDRESS, INQUIRY-HISTORY}}]}}}}

ADDRESS-VARIATIONS.VALUE: XXX XXXXX STREET XXXXX COIMBATORE 6410XX TN
